name: Easy Chocolate Fudge (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8 inch square tin.
2. Break the chocolate into pieces and place with the butter in a basin set over a pan of hot water.
3. Leave until the mixture has melted, stirring once or twice.
4. Remove the basin from the pan of water.
5. Stir in the cream and vanilla essence.
6. Gradually mix in the icing sugar.
7. Transfer to the tin, leave to cool, and then cut into squares.
8. Alternatively, keep the mixture soft over a pan of hot water off the stove.
9. Take spoonfuls of the mixture, roll into balls in hands dusted with icing sugar, and dip into dishes of desiccated coconut, chopped nuts, powdered chocolate, or hundreds and thousands.
